items.name: defi-ape/polymarket-kalshi-arbitrage-bot
items.full_text: 15-minute prediction market arbitrage bot: poll Kalshi Trade API and Polymarket CLOB, detect YES/UP spreads and late-resolution gaps, expose Express /status, and place Polymarket buys via @polymarket/clob-client.

items.name: fxyz666/LogicPipe
items.full_text: LogicPipe 是一个面向边缘多设备协同 LLM 推理的开源软件项目，提供离线管线规划、分布式 stage 权重加载、依赖感知任务调度和上下文 KV cache 复用能力。
